soft.info: Worked on the HSBC Oman and Qatar app with a team consisting of freshers and completed all the requirements with highest level of collaboration. I have repeatedly partnered with senior developers outside my team to resolve global level build issues.

I was trained in full stack however the project assigned in HSBC was of Android. I adapted to it within a week and started contributing by the first month. I was the first in the department to complete the Google Android certification requested by HSBC.

Communicated with stakeholders from Oman and Qatar whilst giving demos for sprint work every alternate week. I also took a lot of knowledge transfer sessions to educate others about the codebase and various technologies.

I worked on making a QR Code module configurable while it was live in production for two other entities. I also helped a different team merge their codebase into our existing live modules, resolved issues during integration and provided robust alternatives.

During the Covid-19 period the Thank You Tree weekly activity was closed off due to work from home. Created an application to resume the activity and increase employee morale. I also took creative design decisions to make the applications entity-wise configurable.
I worked on a project with regulatory requirements and a strict timeline for completion. My team was downsized by one during the Covid-19 outbreak but I still delivered all the requirements on time.
